utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each in the final plan: 1) health_coverage: provided with description and costs ('€0/month') – includes physical and mental health and shows costs; fully specified. 2) property_coverage: 'EliteHome Premium Coverage (€95/month) + Home Security System Discount (€30/month) = €125/month' – shows type and cost; fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: lists components with costs and a total '= €305/month' – costs included; fully specified. 4) additional_services: lists services with costs and a total '= €160/month' – costs included; fully specified. 5) total_budget: shows monthly and annual totals (€590 and €7,080) – fully specified. All five required items are present with costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify items in the final coverage plan that match entries in the ground-truth ratings and map them to their exact ratings. Items present: EliteHome Premium Coverage, Home Security System Discount, Premium Medical Network, Adventure Travel Coverage, 24/7 Travel Assistance, LifeFirst Standard Life Plan, LifeFirst Standard Disability Plan. The 'via company benefits' items and others not listed in ground truth are ignored. LifeFirst Standard Life/Disability Plans are not in the provided ground-truth ratings lists; therefore, no ratings exist for them and they are omitted from RATINGS.
